zh.lifeSummary: 當John Annesley於1289年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親John de Anesle51歲，母親Annora Pierrepont44歲。他於1308年與Amye de Gregor在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1357年6月25日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Annesley于1289年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲John de Anesle51岁，母亲Annora Pierrepont44岁。他于1308年与Amye de Gregor在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1357年6月25日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Annesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Annesley was born in 1289, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, John de Anesle, was 51 and his mother, Annora Pierrepont, was 44. He married Amye de Gregor in 1308, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 June 1357, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Annesley est né en 1289, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Anesle, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Annora Pierrepont, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Amye de Gregor en 1308, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1357, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Annesley 1289 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Anesle 51 und seine Mutter Annora Pierrepont 44. Er hat 1308 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Amye de Gregor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1357 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Annesley è nato il nel 1289 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John de Anesle, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Annora Pierrepont, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Amye de Gregor nel 1308, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1357, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Annesleyが1289年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Anesleは51歳，母Annora Pierrepontは44歳であった。1308年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでAmye de Gregorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1357年6月25日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Annesley(이)가 1289년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Anesle(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Annora Pierrepont(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Amye de Gregor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1357년 6월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Annesley nasceu em 1289, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Anesle, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Annora Pierrepont, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Amye de Gregor em 1308, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1357, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Annesley родился в 1289 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Anesle было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Annora Pierrepont, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Amye de Gregor в 1308 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 июня 1357 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Annesley nació en 1289, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Anesle, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Annora Pierrepont, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Amye de Gregor en 1308, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1357, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
